product.title: Hush Glow™ Foundation Cushion SPF 30 – Skincare-Infused Lightweight Foundation with Mushroom Applicator for Mature Skin, Hyaluronic Acid & Peptides, Buildable Natural Coverage, Non-Cakey Finish-Warm
featureBullets: Made for Mature Skin (55–90+) Designed specifically for older women, this lightweight cushion foundation provides smooth, natural-looking coverage without settling into fine lines, mouth wrinkles, or textured skin.
Warm - Shade designed to blend seamlessly into light to medium or slightly tanned skin tones, providing a balanced, natural-looking result on mature skin.
Skincare-Infused Hydration - Formulated with hyaluronic acid to help attract and retain moisture, keeping mature and dry skin feeling soft, comfortable, and hydrated throughout the day.

Real-Life Filter Effect-Soft-focus pigments help blur the look of pores, uneven tone, and fine lines for a fresh, radiant finish that looks natural in real life—not heavy or mask-like.. Peptide Comfort Formula No Cakey Feel-Peptides help support smoother, firmer-looking skin while the breathable formula remains lightweight, flexible, and comfortable with no cracking or creasing.
SPF 30 + Easy Cushion Application-Provides daily SPF 30 sun protection. The mess-free cushion compact with soft mushroom applicator allows quick, even application—no brushes, no primer needed.

specification.value: Color Correction, Evening Skin Tone, Face, Spot Concealing
Color Correction, Flawless, Hydrating, Radiant Finish, Ultraviolet Protection
#9,268 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #102 in Foundation Makeup
Breathable, Lightweight, Long Lasting, Transfer Resistant, Travel Size

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation's quality good and appreciate its smoothness, with one mentioning it blurs wrinkles without caking in eye fine lines. However, the coverage receives mixed feedback, with one customer noting it doesn't work well on their skin. The application process also gets mixed reviews, with one customer finding it easy to use while another describes it as difficult to apply.

reviews.reviewTitle: At 76 yrs old, I’ve finally found the perfect makeup.
reviews.reviewText: I’ve been waiting to write a review until I was 100% sure of the product. I’ve written many reviews for products I have bought & use from Amazon & I write reviews sometimes because I buy products on Amazon based on reviews. For anyone wondering about Hush Glow Foundation I can honestly say it is the absolute BEST foundation makeup I have ever used & I’m 76 years old so I’ve tried a lot! I have been so, so pleased with everything about it…from the way it’s designed to be applied, to the lightweight coverage, to how it blurs wrinkles & at 76 I have wrinkles, but this minimizes mine. I will never be without this foundation & have now thrown away the 4 different foundations I have bought in the last 1 1/2 years. I am thrilled with Hush Glow & have finally stopped looking for the “perfect foundation”, I FOUND IT!!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Still shows lines on my Face. I bought a concealer for $4 from Temu and it is sooo perfect. Yes it took like 3-4 weeks to come but I ordered 5 of them. They worked perfectly n do not sink in lines on my face!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I LOVE LOVE LOVE this foundation. I put on serum and moisturizer every day and when I put on this foundation I finally get that dewy look! My skin is very dry so this has been a game changer and so easy to apply! Only negative is that the paper filter thing that has the holes in it so you can just tap the applicator and put on your face - it came loose and now there's a ripple in the paper so it comes out in small blobs in that area. I would post a photo but I'm not good with technology.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026

reviews.reviewText: After first use, the membrane cover separated and then the plastic cover came apart. The product itself is good. Color was a match, but difficult to use due to the defective packaging. For the price, I would hesitate to repurchase.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 27, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I was really excited to try this foundation because of all the good reviews, but unfortunately it didn’t work well on my skin. I found it caked up on me and didn’t look smooth at all, even when applied lightly. It does smell nice but just not right for me.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I like the product but not the sponge. Hard to get into tight areas of the face & blend.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Great coverage. Feels silky smooth without greasy build up. Looks smooth without caking in eye fine line. It's so lightweight but has complete coverage. I recommend this product.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Face looks clean and rejuvenated. i guess the wrinkles gotta stay
reviews.reviewText: I felt like a geisha girl. And 3 hours later worse than before. Anyone who has serious wrinkle problem, this is not the miracle in the jar! So disappointed
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026
